zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Pudsay於大約1390年出生在英國藍卡爾博爾頓時，他的父親Sir John Pudsey Knt.31歲，母親Margaret Eure17歲。他和Margaret Tunstall至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1468年4月14日在英國越可爾博爾頓 白 包藍德享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pudsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pudsey (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Podechesai(e) in 1086, Pudekesseya in the 12th century, and Pudekeshay in 1219. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Pudoc (genitive * Pudoces) + Old English ēg ‘island’. Pudsey stands on the top of a hill, and so in this case ēg may have the sense ‘hill spur, island of good land in moorland’. Alternatively, the final element may be Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’ or hēah ‘high ground, height’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Pudsay was born about 1390, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John Pudsey Knt., was 31 and his mother, Margaret Eure, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Margaret Tunstall. He died on 14 April 1468, in Bolton by Bowland, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Pudsay est né environ 1390, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pudsey Knt., avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Eure, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Margaret Tunstall. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1468, à Bolton by Bowland, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Pudsayが約1390年にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Pudsey Knt.は31歳，母Margaret Eureは17歳であった。彼はMargaret Tunstallとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1468年4月14日にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン ビー ボウランドで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Pudsay(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Pudsey Knt.(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Eure(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Margaret Tunstall(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 4월 14일 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 비 보우랜드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Pudsay родился около 1390 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Pudsey Knt. было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Eure, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Margaret Tunstall. Он умер 14 апреля 1468 г. в местности болтон би боуланд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.
